positive: Minimalist geometric forest silhouette, featuring stylized interlocking pine trees, crescent moons, and mountain peaks arranged in a circular mandala pattern. The style is bold and graphic, reminiscent of Scandinavian folklore meets psychedelic art. Use negative space effectively, ensuring crisp, single-color black ink on a pure white background. Strong linework, high contrast, symmetrical composition, centered design, vector illustration aesthetic, suitable for screen printing, isolated on white background.
